name: John Konnayil Vincent
tagline: Software engineer and R&D veteran — database systems, investment tech, and AI/ML tools for DIY investors.
about: Software Engineer and R&D veteran with 20+ years of experience in database systems and investment tech. Currently specializing in the AI/ML space, developing automated tools for DIY investors. Proven track record of taking complex software from architectural design to marketplace success.

writing.name: Seeking Alpha
writing.description: Quarterly series monitoring hedge fund activity of super investors.

writing.name: DIY — Absolute Returns
writing.description: Asymmetric investment opportunities and absolute returns through inefficiency, volatility, and momentum.

books.title: Demystifying Bitcoin
books.subtitle: Kindle Direct Publishing · August 2025
books.description: Paving the way to global digital money.

books.title: Profiting from Hedge Funds
books.subtitle: Wiley · 2013
books.description: Winning strategies from hedge fund 13F filings and coattail investing.

experience.title: Sole Proprietor
experience.description: Architected an end-to-end AI/ML pipeline to analyze SEC 13F filings. Built a custom LLM for quarterly 13F summaries and a multi-model prompting framework for company-specific investment theses. Designed performance-critical DIY investor tools focused on market inefficiency, volatility, and momentum.

experience.title: Senior Software Architect (Director)
experience.description: Project management, research, and development of SQL Server Agent technologies in the CA Unicenter Database Performance Management Insight product suite.

experience.title: Development Manager

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Project management, research, and development of the Debugger and Source Control components of the SQL-Station product suite.

experience.title: Principal Software Engineer
experience.description: Sole developer of SQL-Coder, sold to Platinum Technology three months after general availability.
